title: Subitem status changes to something

posts.author: igsmr (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am building an app and I would like to create a recipe that is triggered but the subitem status change to something specific. At the moment, I only see “subitem status change” trigger.

What are you trying to achieve

Like “status changes to something” I need the same trigger working for the subitem.

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Igor Mia here from monday.com’s support team!

I’d love to help you get this set up! To make sure I point you in the right direction, could you clarify if you’re working on a custom app or if you’re using our API for this integration?

I also wanted to point out that we have a native automation for this exact scenario! You can find the “When subitem Status changes to…” trigger directly in the automation center. Just select the Status change trigger and scroll down to choose the specific subitem Status column you want to track.

Screenshot 2025-10-15 at 9.39.03 AM2158×578 26.4 KB

Let me know if the native automation covers your needs, or if we need to add in details for the custom app/API feature request!

posts.author: igsmr (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for following up. I am working on a custom app.

Say, my app integration provides a recipe, where user can use “subitems status changes to something” as a trigger and then, the action would be whatever app functionality I provide i.e. send data to XYZ.

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s completely fair! Thanks for letting me know.

I’ll make sure this feedback is passed along to our Product Team for the Apps Framework. We’re always working to improve the developer experience, and this kind of input is extremely valuable!

Thanks again for building on the monday.com platform. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any other questions as you continue developing your custom app.
